<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band13_chunk007.pdf#page=12 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band13 p322 -->

NOTTINGWÖRTH


[[File:Band13_chunk007_p012_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band13_chunk007_p012_img002.jpg|thumb|Kaiser Diokletian und sein besessener Sohn, Ausschnitt aus Fresko B]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band13 p323 -->
